summary: Superb Bear soundboard captures an early‑66 Dead set with rare garage‑band material, highlighted by a standout rendition of In the Pines.
review: The tape, likely recorded by Owsley "Bear," offers clear and well‑balanced sound that lets listeners hear the raw, garage‑rock energy of the July 1966 shows.  Reviewers love the rarity of the material—especially the early version of “In the Pines”—and consider it a must‑hear for Deadheads despite the set being almost identical to the July 16 performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 4–5 stars and praise both the historical significance and the high‑quality soundboard recording; only one modest 3‑star comment notes duplication, so overall rating is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as superb and clear, likely a Bear (Owsley) tape; slight preference for the July 16 tracks but still great sound on this set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set mirrors the July 16 show with identical songs, but early‑66 garage‑band vibe and rare material keep it compelling despite the duplication.
